mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation stays elevated while FEDFUNDS is unchanged, real policy rates fall and markets price a longer restriction period, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL decelerates while FEDFUNDS rises and the 10-year yield still falls over 20 trading days in more than 60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE indicates weakening labor demand, which lowers growth and inflation expectations and pulls the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 percentage points over the latest 2 monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-triggered episodes produce a rising 10-year yield in more than 55% of cases or the average 20-day yield change is nonnegative.

mechanism_narrative: A broad increase in PAYEMS and RSAFS signals resilient household income and spending, lifting nominal growth expectations and pushing the 10-year Treasury yield higher within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous PAYEMS and RSAFS improvement is followed by a falling 10-year yield in more than 60% of 20-day windows.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises faster than CPIAUCSL, real activity is improving without a proportional inflation surge, easing duration pressure and pulling the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO increases while CPIAUCSL is flat or declining over the latest 2 monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if the INDPRO-over-CPIAUCSL improvement regime is followed by a positive 20-day yield change in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained drop in HOUST weakens housing-related demand and future activity, which reduces long-rate expectations and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if declining HOUST is followed by higher 10-year yields over 60 trading days in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A FEDFUNDS level above neutral with CPIAUCSL still firm transmits tighter financial conditions into bond markets, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL is unchanged or higher versus the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if the short-horizon tightening trigger fails to produce a positive 5-day yield change in at least 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: If PAYEMS growth slows while UNRATE rises, the labor market is deteriorating faster than headline spending data imply, and the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 20 trading days as growth expectations are repriced lower.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS declines on the latest release and UNRATE rises over the same monthly window
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS-UNRATE deterioration pattern is followed by nonnegative 20-day yield changes in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 is accelerating and RSAFS is expanding together, nominal growth expectations strengthen across the economy, which pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 is revised or reported higher while RSAFS trends upward for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if joint GDPC1 and RSAFS strength is not associated with a higher 10-year yield over 60 trading days in at least 55% of observations.
